content: Just as guided vocabulary reflection in high English learning helps students correct implicit language biases and reinforce long-term mastery of correct usage, structured internal reflexion in autonomous AI agents can be framed as a 'learning workout' that corrects the agent's implicit reasoning biases and encodes successful problem-solving patterns into its dynamic long-term memory. This re-frames agent self-reflexion not as a niche AI technical trick, but as a core learning mechanism identical to how human learners build durable expertise.
